channel.title: Data Visualization on Mirai Data
channel.description: Recent content in Data Visualization on Mirai Data

item.title: 'Mataró out loud' wins the Catalan Dataviz Award from the ViT Foundation
item.description: The project Mataró out loud , the scrollstorytelling about noise levels in the city of Mataró, published by Mirai Data, has been recognised with the Català DataViz award and has also been a finalist in the Young Talent category of the Women DataViz 2025 Awards, organised by the ViT Foundation .

item.title: Mataró out loud
item.description: Traffic, terraces, markets, construction sites, public festivals... Everyday life in cities is noisy.

item.title: #30DayMapChallenge 2024
item.description: Similarly to the #30DayChartChallenge in which we participated in April , during November the map community celebrates the #30DayMapChallenge and we have joined in!

item.title: #30DayChartChallenge 2024
item.description: This year we actively participated in the #30DayChartChallenge and here are the results!
